response.justification: Maria is a strong senior full-stack and web engineer with 15+ years of experience and some systems-level exposure (low-latency DLang services, C/C++ at National Instruments), but the resume shows no evidence of the core requirements for this role: SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator or GPU architecture work, deep-learning workload performance analysis, or hardware-software co-design. The experience profile is web/product engineering, which does not translate to a principal-level hardware performance architecture position.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software experience meeting the BS + 8 years education path
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec, async I/O, fibers) at Dunnhumby
Some C/C++ and embedded/hardware-adjacent exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI, robotic arms)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or silicon architecture experience whatsoever
No deep-learning training/inference optimization or GPU/accelerator workload analysis background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack product engineering, far from principal-level hardware performance architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and hardware co-design experience
No AI/DL workload or GPU architecture background
